q.en: On what date is Guy Fawkes Day celebrated each year?
q.zh: 盖伊·福克斯日每年在哪一日期庆祝？

explain.en: The book says, 'On November 5 every year, people in the United Kingdom watch fireworks and attend bonfires.'
explain.zh: 书中说：'每年11月5日，英国人观看烟花、参加篝火活动。'

q.en: In the glossary, what is a 'dummy'?

options.en: A figure that is a likeness or model of someone

explain.en: The glossary defines dummy as 'a figure that is a likeness or model of someone (p. 4).'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 dummy 定义为'某人的相似物或模型（第4页）'。

q.en: Who led the Gunpowder Plot to kill King James I?
q.zh: 谁领导了刺杀詹姆斯一世国王的火药阴谋？

explain.en: The book says, 'In April 1604, Robert Catesby led a group of men in a plot to kill King James I.'
explain.zh: 书中说：'1604年4月，罗伯特·凯茨比带领一群人策划刺杀詹姆斯一世国王。'

options.en: A crime of betrayal or disloyalty against one's government or ruler
options.zh: 背叛或不忠于自己政府或统治者的罪行

explain.en: The glossary defines treason as 'a crime of betrayal or disloyalty against one's government or ruler (p. 4).'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 treason 定义为'背叛或不忠于自己政府或统治者的罪行（第4页）'。

q.en: How was the Gunpowder Plot discovered?
q.zh: 火药阴谋是如何被发现的？

options.en: A secret letter warned Lord Monteagle, and the king's search found Fawkes and the gunpowder
options.zh: 一封密信警告了蒙蒂格尔勋爵，国王的搜查找到了福克斯和火药

options.en: Guy Fawkes confessed before the plan started
options.zh: 盖伊·福克斯在计划开始前就招供了

options.en: A fire broke out in Parliament

explain.en: The book says a secret letter warned Lord Monteagle not to attend Parliament; 'The king heard this news, he ordered his men to search... They found Fawkes and the fuses... and discovered the barrels of gunpowder.'
explain.zh: 书中说一封密信警告蒙蒂格尔勋爵不要出席议会；'国王闻讯下令搜查……他们发现了福克斯和引信……并找到了火药桶。'

options.en: The lawmaking body of the United Kingdom, made of the House of Commons and the House of Lords
options.zh: 英国的立法机构，由下议院和上议院组成

options.en: A large bonfire built for celebrations
options.zh: 为庆祝而燃起的大篝火

options.en: A type of dummy burned on bonfires
options.zh: 在篝火上烧的一种假人

explain.en: The glossary defines Parliament as 'the lawmaking body of the government of the United Kingdom, consisting of the House of Commons and the House of Lords (p. 7).'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 Parliament 定义为'英国政府的立法机构，由下议院和上议院组成（第7页）'。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To inform readers about the history and traditions of Guy Fawkes Day
options.zh: 向读者介绍盖伊·福克斯日的历史与传统

options.en: To convince readers to build bonfires
To argue that Guy Fawkes was right
options.zh: 主张盖伊·福克斯是对的

options.en: To teach how to make gunpowder

explain.en: The book explains the 1605 plot, how it was caught, and modern Bonfire Night traditions, showing an informative purpose about the holiday's history.
explain.zh: 本书解释了1605年的阴谋、如何被破获以及现代篝火之夜的传统，体现对节日历史进行说明的目的。

q.en: What was Guy Fawkes's role in the plot?
q.zh: 盖伊·福克斯在阴谋中扮演什么角色？

options.en: He guarded the gunpowder hidden in the cellar beneath Parliament
options.zh: 他看守藏在议会地下室里的火药

options.en: He led the group of plotters

explain.en: The book says Fawkes 'pretended to be Thomas Percy's servant... His job was to guard the gunpowder hidden in the basement.'
explain.zh: 书中说福克斯'假装是托马斯·珀西的仆人……他的工作是看守藏在地下室里的火药。'

q.en: What happened to the plotters after Guy Fawkes was caught?
q.zh: 盖伊·福克斯被捕后，密谋者们发生了什么？

options.en: Catesby and three others were killed, and the eight survivors were executed for treason
options.zh: 凯茨比等三人被杀，八名幸存者以叛国罪被处决
他们全都逃到了西班牙

options.en: They were rewarded by the king
options.zh: 他们得到了国王的奖赏

explain.en: The book says, 'Robert Catesby and three others were killed in a gunfight' and 'The English courts sentenced each of the eight surviving plotters to death for being a traitor. In January 1606, Guy Fawkes and three others were executed.'
explain.zh: 书中说'罗伯特·凯茨比等三人在枪战中被杀'，且'法庭以叛国罪判处八名幸存密谋者死刑。1606年1月，盖伊·福克斯等三人被处决。'

q.en: According to the 'Some Fiery Facts' section, what place is named after Guy Fawkes?
q.zh: 根据'一些火热的事实'一节，哪个地方以盖伊·福克斯命名？

options.en: An island in the Galapagos Islands, Ecuador (Isla Guy Fawkes)
options.zh: 厄瓜多尔加拉帕戈斯群岛中的一座岛（伊斯拉·盖伊·福克斯岛）
喜马拉雅山的一座山峰

explain.en: The book notes, 'Guy Fawkes has an island in the Galapagos Islands, Ecuador, named after him, called Isla Guy Fawkes.'
explain.zh: 书中提到：'盖伊·福克斯在厄瓜多尔的加拉帕戈斯群岛有一座以他命名的岛屿，叫伊斯拉·盖伊·福克斯岛。'

prompt.en: Guy Fawkes Day is celebrated with bonfires and a dummy called a 'Guy.' Design your own Bonfire Night poster that shows the main facts of the Gunpowder Plot and how people celebrate today.
prompt.zh: 盖伊·福克斯日以篝火和一个叫'盖伊'的假人为庆祝。设计一张你自己的篝火之夜海报，展示火药阴谋的主要事实和今天人们的庆祝方式。

en: Use the 'What Is Bonfire Night?' and 'The Legacy of the Plot' sections for celebration details.
Include the date November 5 and the bonfire with a dummy.
zh: 参考'什么是篝火之夜？'和'阴谋的遗产'两节了解庆祝细节。
在海报中写上11月5日以及烧假人的篝火。
